title: Is Your Business Ready to Scale Without You Holding It All Together?
subtitle: The free Automation Readiness Assessment scores your business across four dimensions in five minutes and shows you exactly where the gaps are in your business, before they cost you any more.

title: Discover Where Your Business Is Quietly Leaking Value
subtitle: You've built something strong. Steady revenue, loyal clients, a solid reputation. But growth feels heavier than it should. This 7-minute assessment reveals exactly where hidden friction is costing you time, profit, and headspace.
